name: Fudgy Cheesecake Swirl Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Cream Cheese Batter: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a small mixer bowl, beat the cream cheese and 1/2 cup sugar until smooth. Beat in 1 egg and vanilla extract; set aside.
Chocolate Batter: In a heavy-gauge, medium saucepan over low heat, melt the butter and NESTLE unsweetened chocolate bars, stirring until smooth. Stir in 1 3/4 cups sugar. Blend in 3 eggs. Stir in flour.
Spread Chocolate Batter into a greased 13x9 inches baking pan. Smooth Cream Cheese Batter over top. Swirl a metal spatula through the batters to marbleize. Bake for 30-35 minutes until edges begin to pull away from side of pan. Cool completely; cut into 2-inch bars.
Makes about 2 dozen brownies.
